steps.title: Match the audience need
steps.content: The goal is to introduce Eleanor Catlett to readers unfamiliar with her. A useful sentence should identify who Catlett was and what kind of work she is known for, not focus only on individual sculptures.

steps.title: Eliminate narrow details
steps.content:
• Choice A compares two sculpture materials without explaining who Catlett was.
  • Choice B describes only Political Prisoner and gives no artist introduction.
  • Choice C lists dates for two works but omits Catlett's identity and significance.
The remaining choice identifies Catlett and her best-known artistic focus. The answer is D.
